import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; function Dashboard() { const [trashData, setTrashData] = useState([]); const [adminData, setAdminData] = useState([]); const [activeAdmin, setActiveAdmin] = useState(''); // State untuk navigasi menu (dashboard atau admin) const [activeMenu, setActiveMenu] = useState('dashboard'); // 1. Fungsi ambil data dari Backend Flask const fetchData = async () => { try { const resTrash = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/trash'); const resultTrash = await resTrash.json(); setTrashData(resultTrash); const resAdmins = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/admins'); const resultAdmins = await resAdmins.json(); setAdminData(resultAdmins); } catch (error) { console.error("Gagal ambil data:", error); } }; useEffect(() => { const name = localStorage.getItem("nama_aktif"); setActiveAdmin(name || "Admin"); fetchData(); const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 5000); // Auto-update setiap 5 detik return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); return (
{/* Import Font Poppins secara langsung */} {/* --- SIDEBAR KIRI --- */}

setActiveMenu('dashboard')} > 📊 Dashboard
setActiveMenu('admin')} > 👤 User Admin

); } // 🎨 STYLE MODERN & KEKINIAN const styles = { appContainer: { display: 'flex', minHeight: '100vh', backgroundColor: '#1a2c6d', fontFamily: "'Poppins', sans-serif" }, sidebar: { width: '260px', backgroundColor: '#1a2c6d', color: '#fff', padding: '30px 0', borderRight: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, logoArea: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', padding: '0 30px', marginBottom: '50px' }, logoIcon: { backgroundColor: '#fff', color: '#1a2c6d', width: '35px', height: '35px', borderRadius: '8px', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', fontWeight: 'bold', marginRight: '12px' }, logoText: { fontSize: '20px', fontWeight: '700', letterSpacing: '1px' }, navMenu: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }, navItem: { padding: '15px 30px', cursor: 'pointer', color: '#a5b1d9', transition: '0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', fontSize: '14px' }, navItemActive: { padding: '15px 30px', cursor: 'pointer', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderLeft: '4px solid #fff', color: '#fff', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', fontSize: '14px', fontWeight: '600' }, navIcon: { marginRight: '15px', fontSize: '18px' }, mainContent: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#f5f7fb', borderTopLeftRadius: '40px', padding: '40px', overflowY: 'auto' }, topHeader: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: '40px' }, breadcrumb: { color: '#888', fontSize: '13px', fontWeight: '500' }, userProfile: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', backgroundColor: '#fff', padding: '8px 15px', borderRadius: '30px', boxShadow: '0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)' }, userName: { marginRight: '10px', fontWeight: '600', color: '#333', fontSize: '14px' }, avatar: { width: '30px', height: '30px', borderRadius: '50%', backgroundColor: '#eee', display:'flex', justifyContent:'center', alignItems:'center', fontSize:'14px' }, contentWrapper: { padding: '0 10px' }, welcomeText: { fontSize: '24px', fontWeight: '700', marginBottom: '30px', color: '#2c3e50' }, statsGrid: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)', gap: '25px', marginBottom: '40px' }, statCard: { backgroundColor: '#fff', padding: '25px', borderRadius: '18px', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', boxShadow: '0 5px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.02)' }, statIconBox: { fontSize: '28px', marginRight: '20px', width: '55px', height: '55px', backgroundColor: '#f8f9fa', borderRadius: '15px', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }, statValue: { fontSize: '22px', fontWeight: '700', color: '#1a2c6d' }, statLabel: { fontSize: '13px', color: '#888', fontWeight: '500' }, tableSection: { marginTop: '20px' }, tableTitle: { fontSize: '17px', fontWeight: '700', marginBottom: '20px', color: '#2c3e50' }, tableCard: { backgroundColor: '#fff', borderRadius: '20px', padding: '25px', boxShadow: '0 5px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.03)' }, table: { width: '100%', borderCollapse: 'collapse' }, th: { textAlign: 'left', padding: '15px', color: '#adb5bd', fontSize: '12px', borderBottom: '1px solid #f8f9fa', fontWeight: '600', textTransform: 'uppercase' }, td: { padding: '18px 15px', color: '#495057', fontSize: '14px', borderBottom: '1px solid #fcfcfc' }, tr: { transition: '0.2s' }, progressBar: { width: '120px', height: '8px', backgroundColor: '#f1f1f1', borderRadius: '10px', marginBottom: '5px' }, progressFill: { height: '100%', borderRadius: '10px', transition: 'width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)' }, badgeGreen: { backgroundColor: '#d1e7dd', color: '#0f5132', padding: '6px 14px', borderRadius: '30px', fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: '700' }, badgeRed: { backgroundColor: '#f8d7da', color: '#842029', padding: '6px 14px', borderRadius: '30px', fontSize: '11px', fontWeight: '700' }, }; export default Dashboard;
